content:
Hey DEV 👋

I'm Azizbek from Tashkent. I build free EdTech tools for Uzbek students, and lately I've been diving hard into open source.

What I shipped PRs to

•
freeCodeCamp (450k+ stars) - wording fixes in curriculum lectures

•
tesseract.js - remove Open Collective postinstall script

•
highlight.js - highlight self as a JS built-in

•
npmx.dev - quick copy for package version

•
kana-dojo - add a new color theme

•
FableCut - luxury title style (already merged)

What I learned

• Mid-size repos (1k-5k stars) often review faster than mega repos

• Small clear PRs get merged more than giant ones

• Following the repo's existing style matters more than being fancy

• Your GitHub profile compounds fast when you ship consistently

What I'm building myself

•
Avazov IELTS - free IELTS prep with AI writing feedback

•
Chisel - 200+ browser utilities for developers

Still early. Still shipping.

If you're new to open source: start with good first issue, keep the PR tiny, and write a clean description.

Links:

• Portfolio: https://xusnitdinov.pages.dev

• GitHub: https://github.com/xusnitdinov

• LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/xusnitdinov
